text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Trainer! I'm going to try my best playing
the villain today!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Let's go. It's time for the big bad Creek to make
an entrance!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Su-per Creek! Su-per Creek! Su-per Creek!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huh? All these cheers... Is this...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Your borin' li'l story is comin' to an end, Creek!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Tamtam... Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Everyone who knows about you saw your old
races on UmaTube...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
They all know what an amazing Umamusume you
are, Creek.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yup! And that's why ya can drop the villain act!
No one's buyin' it.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya didn't work this hard and come this far to rule
as some evil queen, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Creek! Tell everyone why you're really here! Go
on!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I've come here to become the strongest
Umamusume around. And...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
To make my trainer the greatest in the world!
That's my only dream!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh... Err...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I blurted that out in front of so many people!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That's how it should be.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
From here on, ya gotta be true to yourself. You're
not here to get all shy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's a battle of dreams. Let's see whose comes out
on top.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stage is set. This is where we put everything
we've worked for on the line.
